stemHtml: RUSHAIR 142 on Bern ground hears: "RUSHAIR 142, How do you read?" Transmission is perfectly clear. Reply?

options.a: Bern Ground, Rushair 142, read you good.
options.b: Bern Ground, Rushair 142, read you five.
options.c: Bern Ground, Rushair 142, read you clear.
options.d: Bern Ground, Rushair 142, read you one.
